channel.title: Posts on daniel klotz |
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on daniel klotz |

item.title: movies
item.description: short notes about movies: Paterson. A slow burner. Did not enjoy it much in cinema, but it became one of my favorite movies after watching it multiple times. Dead Man. A good movie. Just not my pair of shoes. Bill & Ted Face the Music. It is what it is. And that is fine. If you like Bill & Ted (like me) you will like this movie, if you don’t like em or don’t know em its nothing for you.
